signals.headline: Kansas State Senate President Ty Masterson Announces Gubernatorial Bid Against Democratic Incumbent** | NO | HIGH confid
signals.raw:
Kansas State Senate President Ty Masterson Announces Gubernatorial Bid Against Democratic Incumbent** | NO | HIGH confidence[1]

Ty Masterson, a Republican describing himself as a "results-oriented conservative," has entered the 2026 Kansas gubernatorial race to challenge term-limited Democratic Gov. Laura Kelly, joining candidates like former Gov. Jeff Colyer, Scott Schwab, and Vicki Schmidt[1].
